name: python3-backports.zstd
title: python3-backports.zstd
summary: Backport of PEP-784 "adding Zstandard to the standard library"
description:
Backport of PEP-784 "adding Zstandard to the standard library"
Zstandard is a widely adopted, mature, and highly efficient compression
standard.
PEP-784 proposes adding a new module to the Python standard library
containing a Python wrapper around Meta's zstd library, the default
implementation since Python 3.14.
.
This module is the backport of PEP-784 for Python 3.13 and before.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-backports.zstd because Backport of PEP-784 "adding Zstandard to the standard library".
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-backports.zstd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-backports.zstd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-backports.zstd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
